summary: Retest of iteration_5 critical fixes for GashaBits LTC multi-pull bundles. All targeted scenarios pass: INVOICE renders for qty-4 with no ReferenceError, totalUsd is correctly scoped, qty-1..qty-5 labels compute correctly ($0.15 x N), invoice crypto amount scales exactly 4x (0.00333185 -> 0.01332741 LTC = 4.000x), cancel-invoice-button resets quantity to 1, machine cabinet renders without prize capsules in IDLE/INVOICE, no auto-advance past INVOICE, responsive layout stacks column at 390px (no horizontal scroll) and row at 1440px. No React error overlay. Only expected explorer 430 errors from Blockchair.
critical_code_review_comments: totalUsd correctly declared in component scope at InvoicePanel.jsx:67 - fix verified.
App.js resetAll() correctly sets quantity=1 (line 122) - fix verified.
handleInsert no longer overwrites quantity - fix verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reveal/multi-capsule drop path (VERIFIED/DISPENSING/DROPPED/REVEALED) is NOT testable without a real on-chain LTC payment (demo/simulate button removed). All pre-payment flows (IDLE quantity, INVOICE render, QR/amount scaling, Cancel reset, responsiveness) verified working. Measured qty-1 amount=0.00333185 LTC, qty-4=0.01332741 LTC, ratio exactly 4.000x at $45.02/LTC live rate.
